name: Imp Scouts
description: Small winged shapes flit along the treeline at dusk, counting your walls.

choices.label: Chase them off
choices.description: Don't let them report back.

choices.label: Let them look
choices.description: Walls speak for themselves. So do open gates.

name: Imp Mischief
description: Tools go missing, milk sours, knots untie themselves. Imps in the storerooms.

choices.label: Smoke them out
choices.description: A night of noise and torches.

choices.label: Endure the pests
choices.description: They'll tire of it. Eventually.

name: A Portal Flickers
description: Hunters report a wound in the air above the old barrow, dripping shadow.

choices.label: Send guards to collapse it
choices.description: Steel and salt and old words.

choices.label: Leave it be
choices.description: It's far away. For now.

name: Whispers at the Walls
description: By night the sentries hear their own names spoken from the dark, softly, in dead voices.

choices.label: Double the watch in pairs
choices.description: No one stands the wall alone.

choices.label: Stop the sentries' ears with wax
choices.description: Old sailors' wisdom against old evils.

name: Plea from a Falling City
description: A mud-spattered rider begs aid for a city besieged by the darkness: grain, timber, anything.

choices.label: Send a relief train
choices.description: If the cities fall, the night comes for everyone.

choices.label: Hoard your stores
choices.description: Charity starves the giver.

name: Cultists Among Us
description: Chalk sigils under a bunk, candle stubs, a missing goat. Someone inside worships the dark.

choices.label: Root them out
choices.description: Question everyone. Trust no one tonight.

choices.label: Watch and wait
choices.description: A known rat is safer than a hidden one.

name: Refugee Column
description: Survivors of a burned town trudge toward your gates, carrying what the darkness left them.

choices.label: Take them in
choices.description: Hands are worth more than grain now.

choices.label: Bar the gates
choices.description: The darkness follows refugees like crows follow a plough.

name: Shadow Blight
description: Where the night-mist touched the fields, the crops stand blackened and weeping.

choices.label: Burn the tainted rows
choices.description: Fire cleans what prayer cannot.

choices.label: Harvest what survives
choices.description: Hungry people can't be choosy.

name: Mercenaries in Retreat
description: The remnant of a shattered free company asks shelter — hard-eyed, ragged, still armed.

choices.label: Hire the survivors
choices.description: They have seen what's coming and lived.

choices.label: Feed them and send them on
choices.description: Kind, and safer.

name: Demon Host
description: They come in ranks now: horned shapes under a banner of smoke, drums like a buried heart.

choices.label: Meet them with steel
choices.description: The walls have held worse. Probably.

choices.label: Tribute of treasure
choices.description: Demons love gold the way rust loves iron.

choices.label: Hide in the keep
choices.description: Let them break on stone and find nothing soft.

name: The Hunting Dark
description: Something walks the night that the sentries will not name. In the morning, a door stands open.

choices.label: Hunt it with torches
choices.description: Whatever it is, it dies like everything else. Hopefully.

choices.label: Bar every door at dusk
choices.description: Let it hunt elsewhere.

name: Last Stand of the Lantern Bearers
description: An adventurer band makes their stand on a nearby hill, lanterns guttering against a sea of shadow.

choices.label: Sally to their aid
choices.description: No one fights the dark alone. Not while you stand.

choices.label: Watch the lights go out
choices.description: Your duty is to your own.

name: The Sky Bleeds
description: At noon the sun dims to a red coal. Cattle low; children cry; the old make signs against evil.

choices.label: Light every torch and bell
choices.description: Drown the dark in fire and noise.

choices.label: Wait it out in silence
choices.description: It passes. Everything passes.

name: Maelgor, Terror of the Veil
description: A named thing comes to your gates: tall as the watchtower, crowned in cold fire. It knows your name.

choices.label: Face it at the gate
choices.description: Legends are made of moments like this. So are graves.

choices.label: Seal the gates and endure
choices.description: It cannot be fought. It can perhaps be outlasted.
